basic_details.job_title: Indian Red Cross Society Haryana Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for DEO, Clerk and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Red Cross Society, Haryana State Branch
basic_details.total_vacancies: Clerk, Accounts Clerk, Senior Data Entry Operator
basic_details.application_mode: Offline, through Registered Post (plain paper application; no prescribed form)
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Red Cross Society, Haryana State Branch, Chandigarh has invited applications for 5 vacancies across three posts: Clerk, Accounts Clerk, and Senior Data Entry Operator. Applications must be submitted offline on plain paper, along with self-attested copies of required documents, sent through registered post. There is no separate application form for this recruitment. The last date to apply is 05 August 2026.

application_fee.details: A Demand Draft of Rs. 500 (Rupees Five Hundred only), drawn in favour of Indian Red Cross Society, Haryana State Branch, Chandigarh, must be sent along with the application.

age_limit.details: Age limits are prescribed under the Service Rules of Indian Red Cross Society and St. John Ambulance, Haryana State Branch, Chandigarh, 2017. Ex-servicemen candidates may be recruited up to 45 years of age plus continued military service added by three years. A relaxation of five years applies for SC/ST/BC category candidates.

qualification.details: Eligibility differs by post, covering educational qualification, computer/language skills, and age. Full post-wise details are given below.

vacancy_details.Qualification & Experience: Graduate from any recognized University. Knowledge of Hindi and English up to Matric standard. Hindi typing at 25 words per minute and English typing at 30 words per minute on computer, with commonly used word processing software. Knowledge of Computer (MS Office from any recognized institution).

B.Com from any recognized University. Five years' experience in accounts is desirable. Knowledge of Computer (MS Office & Tally from any certified recognized institution). Knowledge of Hindi and Sanskrit up to Matric standard.
BCA/B.Sc (Computer Science)/IT from a recognized University. Knowledge of Computer (MS Office from recognized institution). Knowledge of Hindi and Sanskrit up to Matric standard.

post_wise_breakdown.qualification_experience: Graduate from any recognized University. Knowledge of Hindi and English up to Matric standard. Hindi typing at 25 words per minute and English typing at 30 words per minute on computer, with commonly used word processing software. Knowledge of Computer (MS Office from any recognized institution).

B.Com from any recognized University. Five years' experience in accounts is desirable. Knowledge of Computer (MS Office & Tally from any certified recognized institution). Knowledge of Hindi and Sanskrit up to Matric standard.
BCA/B.Sc (Computer Science)/IT from a recognized University. Knowledge of Computer (MS Office from recognized institution). Knowledge of Hindi and Sanskrit up to Matric standard.

how_to_apply: Write your application on plain paper, since there is no separate prescribed application form for this recruitment.
Attach self-attested copies of all required educational, age, and category documents.
Attach a Demand Draft of Rs. 500 drawn in favour of Indian Red Cross Society, Haryana State Branch, Chandigarh.
Send the complete application through registered post to: Indian Red Cross Society, Haryana State Branch, Red Cross Bhawan, Sector-16, Madhya Marg, Chandigarh-160015.
Ensure the application reaches the above address within 15 days from the date of publication of the advertisement, i.e., on or before 05 August 2026.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Indian Red Cross Society Haryana Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply is 05 August 2026, within 15 days from the date of publication of the advertisement.

faq.question: Q2. What is the qualification required for the Clerk post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be graduates from a recognized university, with knowledge of Hindi and English up to Matric standard, computer typing skills, and MS Office knowledge.

faq.question: Q3. What is the qualification required for the Accounts Clerk post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a B.Com degree from a recognized university, with five years' experience in accounts desirable, along with MS Office and Tally knowledge.

faq.question: Q4. What is the qualification required for the Senior Data Entry Operator post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a BCA, B.Sc (Computer Science), or IT degree from a recognized university, with MS Office knowledge and Hindi/Sanskrit up to Matric standard.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for Indian Red Cross Society Haryana Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 500, payable through a Demand Draft in favour of Indian Red Cross Society, Haryana State Branch, Chandigarh.

faq.question: Q6. Is there an online application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No. Applications must be submitted offline on plain paper and sent through registered post only.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for Indian Red Cross Society Haryana posts?
faq.answer: The age limit is 21–45 years for Clerk and Accounts Clerk, and 25–45 years for Senior Data Entry Operator, with a 5-year relaxation for SC/ST/BC candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Is there a prescribed application form for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No. There is no separate application form; candidates must apply on plain paper with self-attested copies of the required documents.
